title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at EY India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at EY India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, EY India Asia Pacific Associates in Srinagar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About EY India Asia Pacific Associates:
EY India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EY India Asia Pacific Associates!
